name: Quicksilver Secured Cash Rewards
effective_cost: Free — no annual fee, refundable deposit sets your credit line

verdict.text: Rare secured card that earns 1.5% cash back like its unsecured sibling

earn_rates.category: Hotels, vacation rentals & rental cars — via Capital One Travel

earn_note: Unlike the non-rewards Platinum Secured, this card earns the exact same unlimited 1.5% flat cash back as the unsecured Quicksilver, plus 5% on Capital One Travel hotel/rental-car bookings — the security deposit buys approval, not a worse rewards rate. No sign-up bonus and no 0% intro APR, unlike the unsecured Quicksilver.

redemption_options.method: Statement credit, check, direct deposit, or gift cards

points.note: Straight 1¢-per-point cash back with no minimum redemption and no expiration while the account is open — identical redemption terms to the unsecured Quicksilver.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer currency — straight cash back only.

insurance.detail: Not advertised in Capital One's marketing materials for this card
Not advertised in Capital One's marketing materials for this card
Not advertised in Capital One's marketing materials for this card

protection_note: Capital One's own pages for this card focus entirely on the deposit mechanics and cash-back rate — they don't call out the purchase protection, extended warranty, or price protection suite that the unsecured Quicksilver advertises. Treat this as a bare-bones protection package unless your Guide to Benefits says otherwise.
rental_note: No rental car coverage is advertised for this card — use a different card for rentals.

services.name: Refundable security deposit sets your credit line
services.detail: Minimum $200 deposit (no interest paid on it) opens the account at that credit line; you can deposit up to $3,000 before activation, depending on creditworthiness, to start with a higher limit. You have 35 days after approval to fund it, in increments of at least $20.

services.name: Deposit refund path
services.detail: Earn your deposit back as a statement credit through responsible use, or get it refunded when you close the account with a zero balance. Capital One automatically reviews accounts for a credit-line increase (no added deposit needed) roughly every 6 months.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: Credit bureau reporting
services.detail: Reports to all three major credit bureaus every month — the core reason to hold a secured card.

services.name: APR
services.detail: 28.99% variable on purchases and cash advances; no introductory 0% period.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns 1.5% cash back on their spend (into your account)
Can help build the authorized user's credit history too

additional_cards.note: Free to add — since this card actually earns rewards, an authorized user's spend adds real cash back on top of the credit-building benefit.
